title: MatchResult
description: Per-mutation match evaluation. Records how each inserted mutation compares against the findings in a detector report. Produced by the insert_me evaluator.

run_id.description: 16-character hex run identifier linking this result to the insert_me output bundle.

tool.description: Name of the detection tool whose report was evaluated.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this evaluation was performed.

mutations_evaluated.description: Total number of mutations from ground_truth.json that were evaluated.

matches.description: One match record per evaluated mutation.

mutation_index.description: Zero-based index into ground_truth.json mutations array.

file.description: Relative path of the mutated source file.

line.description: 1-based line number of the mutation site.

cwe_id.description: CWE identifier of the inserted vulnerability, if known.

match_level.description: Quality of match: exact (file+CWE+line), family (same CWE family), semantic (keyword heuristic), or no_match.

matched_finding.description: The detector finding that was matched, or null if no match.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this match level was assigned.

adjudication_pending.description: If true, a semantic match was found but LLM adjudication has not been performed. Absent or false otherwise.
